tank.driver_or_3wood: You've been over the top in practice. Feel right field. Take 3-wood.
tank.driver_or_3wood_clean: Driver is fine today. Trust your swing.
tank.red_vs_yellow: Red stake: lateral drop within 2 club lengths, no nearer the hole. Yellow: back-on-line only.
tank.yellow_vs_red: Yellow stake: back-on-line drop only. Red allows lateral relief.
tank.par3_wind: Wind in your face. Take one more club and swing smooth.
tank.layup: Lay up to your favorite wedge number. Avoid the trouble short.
tank.nearest_point_relief: Find nearest point, no nearer hole, where you get full relief from cart path or sprinkler. Drop within 1 club length. No penalty.
tank.can_ground_club_yes: Yes. Fairway or rough, ground it.
tank.can_ground_club_no: No. Penalty area or bunker - don't ground it. 2 stroke penalty.
tank.flag_or_center_safe: Center of the green. Every time. You don't have the skill to hunt flags yet.
tank.flag_or_center_attack: Attack it. Wedge in hand, go at it.
tank.flag_or_center_balanced: Center. A 30-foot putt is better than a short-sided bunker.
tank.analyze_hole_photo: I've got the hole photo — let me read the layout and call your line.
tank.analyze_swing_video: Swing video detected. I'll have the full read once the backend's wired.

labels.meta_glasses_instructions:
1. In Meta View: Settings → Save to Camera Roll = ON.
2. Grant SmartPlay access to Photos.
3. Say "Hey Meta, take a photo" on course. Tank will auto-detect it.
labels.meta_glasses_new_photo: New photo from Ray-Ban Meta detected
labels.meta_glasses_new_video: New swing video from Ray-Ban Meta detected

voice.over_the_top_detected: Detected over the top. Here's the fix.

settings.glasses_mode_desc: Use Ray-Ban Meta for hands-free Tank
settings.glasses_tutorial_body:
Quick setup:

1. Pair Ray-Ban Meta in iPhone Bluetooth
2. iPhone Settings → Accessibility → Touch → Call Audio Routing → Bluetooth Headset
3. Keep SmartPlay open in background
4. Say "Hey Meta" then ask Tank

Tank will respond in your glasses.
settings.glasses_how_to_body:
1. Phone in pocket, SmartPlay open
2. Say "Hey Meta" to glasses
3. Ask: "Tank, driver or 3-wood?"
4. Hear the answer in your glasses
settings.mic_required_body: SmartPlay needs mic access to hear you through glasses. Enable in Settings.

scorecard.title: Scorecard
scorecard.no_round_sub: Start a round from the Caddie tab
scorecard.club_footer: Helps you pack the right bag · feeds the caddie's usage patterns.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_round_sub: Pick a course to start a round →
dashboard.no_rounds_sub: Start your first round with Kevin to see your stats here.

play.course_discovery_sub: Search here. Start rounds from Caddie setup.
play.notes_placeholder: Anything Kevin should know going into this round?
play.mode_break_100_desc: First goal. Avoid blow-up holes. Bogey is gold.
play.mode_break_90_desc: Smart misses. Lay up when in doubt. Pars matter.
play.mode_break_80_desc: Aggressive but disciplined. Hunt birdies, manage risk.
play.mode_free_play_desc: Just play. Kevin keeps it casual.
play.end_round_body: Save the scorecard to your history (updates handicap), or discard everything and start fresh.
play.discard_body: All shots, scores, and plans from this round will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

swinglab.card_smartmotion_sub: AI swing analysis · acoustic swing detection · body mechanics
swinglab.card_coach-mode_sub: Watch + analyze someone else's swing · player roster · coach notes
swinglab.card_drills_sub: Primary Issue · Common Faults · pro instructor videos
swinglab.card_library_sub: Captured swings, uploads from camera roll
swinglab.card_tempo_sub: Swing to the beat · Tour-Tempo 3:1 · tick·tick·tock
swinglab.tut_1: SwingLab is your practice hub — capture swings, run drills, study reps.
swinglab.tut_2: Tap Smart Motion to capture and analyze your swings; Coach Mode is for working with someone else.
swinglab.tut_3: Every swing you analyze feeds my read of your tendencies on the course.
swinglab.tut_spoken: SwingLab. Practice hub. Tap a card to jump in.
